mapper.sql: id, title, summary, content, department_id, author, image, views, status, publish_time, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: select from t_article order by id desc
mapper.update: update t_article set title = #{et.title}, summary = #{et.summary}, content = #{et.content}, department_id = #{et.departmentId}, author = #{et.author}, image = #{et.image}, views = #{et.views}, status = #{et.status}, publish_time = #{et.publishTime}, create_time = #{et.createTime}, update_time = #{et.updateTime} where id = #{et.id}
